name: MeshTopologyVertexList
summary: Provides access to the mesh topology vertices of a mesh. Topology vertices are sets of vertices in the MeshVertexList that can topologically be considered the same vertex.

methods.name: ConnectedEdge
methods.signature: public int ConnectedEdge(int topologyVertexIndex, int edgeAtVertexIndex)
methods.summary: Gets a particular edge that is connected to a topological vertex. Call TopologyVertices.SortVertices before this if you are interested in ordered edges.

params.name: topologyVertexIndex
params.doc: Index of a topology vertex in Mesh.TopologyVertices.

params.name: edgeAtVertexIndex
params.doc: Index of the edge at the vertex.

returns.doc: The index of the connected edge.

methods.name: ConnectedEdges
methods.summary: Gets all edges that are connected to a given vertex. Call TopologyVertices.SortVertices before this if you are interested in ordered edges.

params.name: topologyVertexIndex
params.doc: Index of a topology vertex in Mesh.TopologyVertices.

returns.doc: Indices of all edges around vertex that are connected to this topological vertex. null if no faces are connected to this vertex.

methods.name: ConnectedEdgesCount
methods.summary: Gets the count of edges that are connected to a given vertex.

params.name: topologyVertexIndex
params.doc: Index of a topology vertex in Mesh.TopologyVertices.

returns.doc: The amount of edges at this vertex. This can be 0.

methods.name: ConnectedFaces
methods.summary: Gets all faces that are connected to a given vertex.

params.name: topologyVertexIndex
params.doc: Index of a topology vertex in Mesh.TopologyVertices.

returns.doc: Indices of all faces in Mesh.Faces that are connected to this topological vertex. null if no faces are connected to this vertex.

methods.name: ConnectedTopologyVertices(Int32)
methods.summary: Gets all topological vertices that are connected to a given vertex.

params.name: topologyVertexIndex
params.doc: index of a topology vertex in Mesh.TopologyVertices.

returns.doc: Indices of all topological vertices that are connected to this topological vertex. null if no vertices are connected to this vertex.

methods.name: ConnectedTopologyVertices(Int32, Boolean)
methods.signature: public int[] ConnectedTopologyVertices(int topologyVertexIndex, bool sorted)
methods.summary: Gets all topological vertices that are connected to a given vertex.

params.name: topologyVertexIndex
params.doc: index of a topology vertex in Mesh.TopologyVertices.

params.name: sorted
params.doc: if true, the vertices are returned in a radially sorted order.

returns.doc: Indices of all topological vertices that are connected to this topological vertex. null if no vertices are connected to this vertex.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets an enumerator that yields all topology vertices in this collection.

methods.name: IndicesFromFace
methods.summary: Returns TopologyVertexIndices for a given mesh face index.

params.name: faceIndex
params.doc: The index of a face to query.

methods.name: IsHidden
methods.summary: Returns true if the topological vertex is hidden. The mesh topology vertex is hidden if and only if all the ON_Mesh vertices it represents is hidden.

params.name: topologyVertexIndex
params.doc: index of a topology vertex in Mesh.TopologyVertices.

returns.doc: true if mesh topology vertex is hidden.

methods.name: MeshVertexIndices
methods.summary: Gets all indices of the mesh vertices that a given topology vertex represents.

params.name: topologyVertexIndex
params.doc: Index of a topology vertex in Mesh.TopologyVertices to query.

returns.doc: Indices of all vertices that in Mesh.Vertices that a topology vertex represents.

methods.name: SortEdges()
methods.summary: Sorts the edge list for the mesh topology vertex list so that the edges are in radial order when you call ConnectedTopologyVertices. A non-manifold edge is treated as a boundary edge with respect to sorting. If any boundary or non-manifold edges end at the vertex, then the first edge will be a boundary or non-manifold edge.

methods.name: SortEdges(Int32)
methods.summary: Sorts the edge list for as single mesh topology vertex so that the edges are in radial order when you call ConnectedTopologyVertices. A non-manifold edge is treated as a boundary edge with respect to sorting. If any boundary or non-manifold edges end at the vertex, then the first edge will be a boundary or non-manifold edge.

params.name: topologyVertexIndex
params.doc: index of a topology vertex in Mesh.TopologyVertices>

methods.name: TopologyVertexIndex
methods.summary: Gets the topology vertex index for an existing mesh vertex in the mesh's VertexList.

params.name: vertexIndex
params.doc: Index of a vertex in the Mesh.Vertices.

returns.doc: Index of a topology vertex in the Mesh.TopologyVertices.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets or sets the number of mesh topology vertices.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets or sets the vertex at the given index. Setting a location adjusts all vertices in the mesh's vertex list that are defined by this topological vertex The index must be valid or an IndexOutOfRangeException will be thrown.
